title: cystopus calcaratus
intro: Cystopus calcaratus, also known as the sea squirt or tuck kue, is a type of marine alga belonging to the family Dictyotaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Cystopus calcaratus include its potential to reduce blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antitumor activities. It can be prepared as a herbal tea, capsule, or extract, and is often used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote overall well-being and longevity.
